title: 2025-09-08 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 2.37
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-09-08: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 2.37/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-09-08, the score printed 2.37/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
